message:
feat(core): wire TuningConfig into ObservationRuntime (ft-fled9)

Add tuning: Arc<TuningConfig> field to ObservationRuntime with:
- with_tuning() builder method for providing parsed config
- tuning() accessor for subsystem reads
- tuning_arc() for cloning into spawned tasks
- Default TuningConfig when with_tuning() is not called

The Config struct in config.rs now includes a tuning field, so
ft.toml [tuning] sections will be parsed automatically.

Validation: rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenterm-core => exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
